title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.2.57-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.57
- Use global DNS even for static IP with static DNS. (RHEL-126738)
- Add libreswan leftprotoport and rightprotoport support. (RHEL-130914)
full_text:
[2.2.57-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.57
- Use global DNS even for static IP with static DNS. (RHEL-126738)
- Add libreswan leftprotoport and rightprotoport support. (RHEL-130914)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1833.html
